title: Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic
title_zh: Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic
abstract:
iRobot co-founder Colin Angle talks about his latest venture, creating next-gen social robots with Familiar Machines. 
 The post  Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: iRobot co-founder Colin Angle talks about his latest venture, creating next-gen social robots with Familiar Machines. The post Podcast: Colin Angle discusses building companion robots with Familiar Machines & Magic appeared first on The Robot Report .
